cleavage agent: digested respectively using alpha lytic protease, or a combination of trypsin, Lys-C and Glu-C
fragmentation method: following higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD) with stepped collision energy
instrument: eluted into the nano-electrospray ion source of an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos Tribrid mass spectrometer
ionization type: eluted into the nano-electrospray ion source
reduction reagent: reduced by incubating with 10 mM of dithiothreitol
reduction concentration: reduced by incubating with 10 mM of dithiothreitol
